title: Ownership Ambiguity Resolution
friction_templates: Unclear ownership at handoff points causing delays
Multiple people assume someone else is responsible
No single point of accountability for end-to-end workflow
Decision authority not clearly defined between roles
Escalation paths are undefined or inconsistent
decision_rights_templates: Assign single owner for each workflow stage
Define explicit escalation thresholds and paths
Create RACI matrix for critical decision points
Establish default decision-maker when owner unavailable
Document decision authority limits for each role
stop_doing_templates: Stop assuming 'someone will handle it' - assign explicit owners
Stop cc'ing everyone hoping someone responds
Stop scheduling meetings to decide who should decide
Stop creating shared ownership - it means no ownership
Stop waiting for consensus on operational decisions
experiment_templates: Day 1-2: Assign one person as single owner for one complete workflow cycle
Day 3-4: Document every decision point and who made it
Day 5-7: Review ownership gaps and reassign with explicit accountability
